zh.Beddington, Croydon, Surrey, England: 英國英格蘭素瑞貝丁頓
zh.Beddington, Surrey, England: 英國英格蘭素瑞貝丁頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Carew Esq.於大約1363年出生在英國素瑞貝丁頓時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Carew33歲，母親Lucy Willoughby45歲。他於1374年5月之前與Isabel De La Mare結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭素瑞被列為sheriff。他去世於1432年9月4日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞貝丁頓。

zh-hans.Beddington, Croydon, Surrey, England: 英国英格兰素瑞貝丁頓
zh-hans.Beddington, Surrey, England: 英国英格兰素瑞貝丁頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Carew Esq.于大约1363年出生在英国素瑞貝丁頓时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Carew33岁，母亲Lucy Willoughby45岁。他于1374年5月之前与Isabel De La Mare结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰素瑞被列为sheriff。他去世于1432年9月4日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞貝丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Carew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, James Patrick, Kieran.

Welsh (Pembrokeshire): habitational name from any of various minor places in Wales, in particular one near Pembroke with a major castle, named from Welsh caer ‘fort’ + rhiw ‘hill, slope’. The surname was taken to Ireland soon after the Norman invasion of England and was Gaelicized as de Carrún. In the 16th century a family called Carew from Devon played an important part in establishing the Tudor administration in Ireland.
Cornish (Somerset and Devon): from the cognate Cornish word kerrow (plural of ker ‘fort’), which occurs seven times as a placename in Cornwall.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Carew Esq. was born about 1363, in Beddington, Surrey, England, his father, Sir Nicholas Carew, was 33 and his mother, Lucy Willoughby, was 45. He married Isabel De La Mare before May 1374. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as sheriff in Surrey, England, United Kingdom. He died on 4 September 1432, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Beddington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Carew Esq. est né environ 1363, à Beddington, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Carew, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lucy Willoughby, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Isabel De La Mare avant mai 1374. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 4 septembre 1432, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Beddington, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Carew Esq. um 1363 in Beddington, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas Carew 33 und seine Mutter Lucy Willoughby 45. Er hat vor Mai 1374 Isabel De La Mare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als sheriff in Surrey, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. September 1432 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Beddington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Carew Esq. è nato il circa 1363 nel Beddington, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas Carew, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Lucy Willoughby, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Isabel De La Mare prima del maggio 1374. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 4 settembre 1432, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Beddington, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Beddington, Croydon, Surrey, England: イギリスイギリススリーベッドイントン
ja.Beddington, Surrey, England: イギリスイギリススリーベッドイントン
ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Carew Esq.が約1363年にイギリススリーベッドイントンで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Carewは33歳，母Lucy Willoughbyは45歳であった。1374年5月以前にIsabel De La Mareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリススリーでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1432年9月4日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリーベッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Carew Esq.(이)가 대략 1363년 영국 수리 베딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Carew(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Willoughby(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1374년 5월 이전 Isabel De La Mare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1432년 9월 4일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 베딩턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Beddington, Croydon, Surrey, England: Beddington, Sūþrīge, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Carew Esq. nasceu aproximadamente 1363, em Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Carew, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Willoughby, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel De La Mare antes maio de 1374. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 4 de setembro de 1432, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Carew Esq. родился около 1363 г. в местности беддингтон, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Carew было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lucy Willoughby, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel De La Mare перед май 1374 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии sheriff в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 4 сентября 1432 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности беддингтон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Carew Esq. nació aproximadamente 1363, en Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Carew, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lucy Willoughby, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Isabel De La Mare antes de mayo de 1374. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 4 de septiembre de 1432, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
